# Styrby

Styrby is a mobile-first dashboard for developers who use AI coding agents. It supports 11 CLI coding agents: Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, OpenCode, Aider, Goose, Amp, Crush, Kilo, Kiro, and Droid. Monitor costs, approve permissions, and review session history from your phone while agents run on your dev machine.

## What Styrby Does

- Remote control: Start, pause, and interact with AI agents from the Styrby mobile app
- Cost tracking: Real-time per-session, per-agent, per-message, and per-file context spend with budget alerts
- Permission approval: Approve or reject risky agent actions (file writes, shell commands) from mobile
- Session history: Replay past agent sessions with full message history and cost breakdown
- Session checkpoints: Named save points within sessions, available on Pro and above
- Session sharing: Share encrypted session replays with a separate decryption key, Pro and above
- Voice commands: Dictate commands and approvals hands-free (Power tier)
- Cloud monitoring: Submit and monitor cloud jobs with push notifications (Power tier)
- Code review from mobile: Submit code reviews and track results from your phone (Power tier)
- OTEL export: Send metrics to Grafana, Datadog, Honeycomb, and more (Power tier)
- E2E encryption: Session content is encrypted with TweetNaCl on the CLI. Styrby relays ciphertext only. We cannot read your code or prompts.
- Team support: Shared dashboards, per-developer spend attribution, role-based access (Pro and Power tiers)

## Key Pages

- Homepage: https://styrbyapp.com
- Features: https://styrbyapp.com/features
- Pricing: https://styrbyapp.com/pricing (Free, Pro $24/mo, Power $59/mo)
- Security architecture: https://styrbyapp.com/security
- Security comparison vs Claude Channels and Dispatch: https://styrbyapp.com/security/compare
- Blog: https://styrbyapp.com/blog
- Documentation: https://styrbyapp.com/docs
- Getting started: https://styrbyapp.com/docs/getting-started

## Technology

- CLI: Node.js, connects to AI agents on developer machines
- Mobile: React Native (Expo), iOS and Android
- Web dashboard: Next.js 15, hosted on Vercel
- Backend: Supabase (PostgreSQL, Auth, Realtime)
- Encryption: TweetNaCl (NaCl box construction, X25519 key exchange)
- Payments: Polar (merchant of record)

## Company

Built by Steel Motion LLC. Veteran-owned. Based in the United States.
Contact: support@styrbyapp.com
